reasoning: The main limiter is the 9.3% decline from 5-min to 20-min power due to poor lactate clearance. Last ride shows consistent effort but benefits from targeted over-unders to strengthen your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. This workout bridges gaps ahead of the sustained climb in the Alpine Loop target event.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x(3min 201-209W, 2min 242-256W). This over-under structure improves lactate clearance and aerobic strength.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
